mapper.select: SELECT task_id, task_type, rank_code, period_id, task_status, progress_json, reason, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_rank.rank_rebuild_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_rank.rank_rebuild_task SET task_status = 'RUNNING', updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE bluenote_rank.rank_rebuild_task SET task_status = 'SUCCESS', progress_json = #{progressJson}, error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE bluenote_rank.rank_rebuild_task SET task_status = 'FAILED', progress_json = #{progressJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
